info.title: Travel SaaS API
info.description:
API for the Travel SaaS Platform.

**Authentication**: All endpoints (except health) require a valid Firebase ID token in the Authorization header. Use the **Authorize** button to set the token.

**Organization context**: Most endpoints require the `X-Organization-Id` header with an organization the user belongs to. GET /api/me does not require it.

**RBAC**: Roles (ADMIN, MANAGER, AGENT) are per-organization. Permissions: VIEW_ALL, VIEW_OWN, CONVERT, DELETE, MANAGE_USERS. Agents see only their own records where applicable.
